Geographic.description: Any column or table representing a physical location, address component, or geographic area
Geographic.label: Geographic

Address.description: Street addresses, mailing addresses, or physical site addresses
Address.label: Address

GeoCoordinate.description: Latitude/longitude pairs, GPS coordinates, or geospatial point data
GeoCoordinate.label: GeoCoordinate

AdminRegion.description: Administrative or political geographic regions — countries, states, provinces, counties, districts, municipalities, or named areas
AdminRegion.label: AdminRegion

PostalCode.description: Postal codes, ZIP codes, or mail routing codes
PostalCode.label: PostalCode

Timezone.description: Timezone identifiers, UTC offsets, or time zone region names
Timezone.label: Timezone

NonGeographic.description: Columns with location-like names that do NOT represent physical geography (file paths, URLs, memory addresses)
NonGeographic.label: NonGeographic
